reviews.originalComment: Ini hotel sangat rekomendasi untuk yang datang berdua sama kawan, dalam kegiatan apapun, pelayanan nya oke, kebersihannya oke, fasilitas mantap betul, pokoknya mantap deh, saya kalau ke banda selalu nginap disini.
reviews.reviewComments: This hotel is highly recommended for those coming in pairs with a friend, for any activities; the service is great, the cleanliness is great, the facilities are really excellent, really awesome, I always stay here when I go to Banda.

reviews.originalComment: Untuk hotel dgn dgn fasilitas yg mantap harga 100ribuan itu sudah luar biasa. Tempat tidur nyaman,Ac dingin bgt josssss,kamar mandi ada air panas. Semua sudah okay,tp sekedar saran untuk ka2k bagian cleaning servis nya tolong kak boleh ramah sedikit ke tamu jgn ketus x dan wajah cemberut xxxx,trus klu kerja membersihkan pelan2 jgn dibanting2 dan berisik gt,itu aja saran nya. Selebih nya untuk hotel josss mantap.
reviews.reviewComments: For a hotel with great facilities, a price of around 100,000 is already extraordinary. The bed is comfortable, the air conditioning is really cold, and there is hot water in the bathroom. Everything is fine, but just a suggestion for the cleaning service staff, please be a bit friendlier to guests, don't be curt and have a sour face. Also, when cleaning, do it slowly, don't slam things around and make noise. That's just my suggestion. Other than that, the hotel is awesome.

reviews.originalComment: Untuk semua sudah okay banget. Sekedar saran untuk ka2k yg bagian cleaning servis tolong ramah sedikit ke tamu ya kak dan jgn ketus x dan kerja kasar x sampai bersuara. Ramah sedikit ya kak ke tamu
reviews.reviewComments: Everything is really okay for all. Just a suggestion for the cleaning service staff, please be a bit friendlier to the guests and avoid being curt and making loud noises while working. Be a little friendlier to the guests, please.

reviews.originalComment: Hotel belakang depan nya barang / til am yang ngak terpakai berserak Kotor spt gudang. Ac tidak dingin
reviews.reviewComments: The hotel behind the front has unused items scattered around, dirty like a warehouse. The air conditioner is not cold.

reviews.reviewTitle: The receptionist who is very fierce.
reviews.originalComment: Resepsionis cowoknya kayak tukang pukul, yg tdak brsahabat sama sekali, utk pesan 1 single bad aja smpai 100 udh kalah pula hotel mewah, mana kamarnya dlm gudang balakang, pokoknya ga recomended deh
reviews.reviewComments: The male receptionist looks like a bouncer, who is not friendly at all. Booking a single bed took a long time, and the hotel is also expensive. On top of that, the room is in the back storage area. Overall, it's definitely not recommended.

reviews.reviewComments: For those looking for affordable accommodation close to the city center, this is the place.
